svg.title: Kenyan Customer Search Behaviour — Query Patterns by Industry and Intent Type
svg.text: Query Patterns by Industry and Intent Type
how to evaluate generator suppliers Kenya
difference boarding vs day school Kenya
land for sale near Ngong Road price
what is VAT in Kenya for SMEs
bei ya website Kenya (Swahili price query)
how to prepare for root canal Kenya
pediatrician near me Nairobi open now
HIGH-VALUE SWAHILI QUERY PATTERNS (Often missed by competitors)
Recommended: English-primary pages with Swahili keywords naturally embedded — captures bilingual search without doubling content effort
DOMINANT QUESTION-FORMAT QUERY PATTERNS IN KENYA
2. Google Keyword Planner — filtered to Kenya
3. Google Search Console — actual Kenyan queries
4. Manual SERP analysis — what ranks, what it covers
Topical depth beats page count — define, don't just mention
Most Kenyan B2B websites have thin, unstrategic content — one comprehensive site covering all sub-topics of a niche
can outrank 6 competitors with thin service pages. Topical authority builds in 3–9 months.
